target: Implement deterministic recovery actions for missing panes, pane respawn, and canonical layout reset.
invariants: Preserve the tmux-host repo structure under src/tmux_host/ and keep subsystem boundaries intact.
Do not reintroduce Dopemux-specific ownership into host core; Dopemux remains an integration profile.
Keep desktop, mobile, CLI, and tmux-native surfaces consuming the same derived state model where UI/state files are touched.
Do not broaden allowlists or mix unrelated cleanup into these packets.
Recovery must return to declared profile intent, not accidental historical geometry.
Reset layout and respawn must operate through metadata and declared profile/adapters.

steps.task: Document the recovery model and add CLI/core entrypoints for respawn and reset-layout using declared profile intent.
requirements: Do not revive unknown panes of unknown origin.
Keep actions explicit and command-equivalent across surfaces.

steps.task: Implement missing-pane recreation, metadata-preserving respawn, and canonical layout reapplication in the tmux layer.
requirements: Use metadata and declared pane specs for lookup and recreation.
Do not convert reset-layout into arbitrary saved-geometry replay.

steps.task: Add integration tests for missing-pane recovery, pane respawn, and reset-layout behavior.
requirements: Test recovery against declared pane ids, not position-only assumptions.
Keep tests specific to recovery semantics.
